description: XRP (XRP) is the native token of XRP Ledger launched in 2012 with the sole mission of being faster than Bitcoin. Today, as extended utility on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 XRP enables instant finality, ultra-low fees, exceptional throughput, and scalable infrastructure for cross-border payments, delivering commercialized performance more than 100× faster than XRP could achieve on its original network.
name: XRP
